boundaries.title_guess: Spain & France: Zamora, Salamanca, Madrid, Toledo, Pyrenees & David's house

evidence.excerpt: Thursday July 31st 2008 ... We slept in Zamora campsite + drove into Zamora the next day
Simon, Eve & Charles (19) are in Spain. We arrived here by ferry with Thomas, Nadin + Austin who have gone over the Pyrenees

boundaries.title_guess: Local picnic: Trimpley / Hampton Lode with Helen & Margaret

evidence.excerpt: April 4th 2009 Simon & Eve & Tonic drove over to [?Trumpby] & took Helen & Margaret out for a picnic lunch at Hampton ? Lode

boundaries.mixed_detail: Date jumps from the 2008 Spain/France trip straight to April 4th 2009; this is a short same-day van picnic outing, distinct from the eastward trip that begins B_0159_R.

boundaries.title_guess: East Anglia: Peckover House, Fotheringay, Foulsham, Norfolk Broads, Halesworth

evidence.excerpt: Saturday April 18th. Simon, Eve & Tonic set off eastwards ... lunch in the carpark near Peckover House
We returned to 86 at about 7.45. Charles had already eate[n].

boundaries.title_guess: Shropshire & borders: Enville, Long Mynd (Hamperley), Oswestry

evidence.excerpt: Mayors Sunday At 9.50, we went to church & then on to Enville for lunch in a field. (S.E, Tonic)
On to Hamperley campsite, SE corner Long Mynd ... On to Oswestry by a route to the west partly in Wales

boundaries.title_guess: Local tea outing: Bewdley / Trimpley with Margaret & Helen

evidence.excerpt: Mary cooked us a delicious supper + we came home.
May 17th Sunday. 2pm we set off in the rain to take Margaret + Helen out. to tea ... took Margaret + Helen back to Trimpley + went home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page ends the Oswestry trip ('we came home') then starts the short May 17th Sunday tea outing on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: Local tea/evening outings: Hampton Lode/Arley, Trimpley, Kings Norton (May–July 2009)

evidence.excerpt: May 31st Sunday a glorious afternoon. We took Helen + Margaret out to tea.
Friday July 24th John, Simon, Eve + Tonic went along beyond Kings Norton ... It was 9.15, so we came home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page contains three short same-day local van outings (May 31st, Sat July 18th, Fri July 24th), each leaving from and returning home; grouped as a cluster of micro-outings.

boundaries.title_guess: Northumberland & Yorkshire: Humber Bridge, Bridlington, Alnwick, Bamburgh, Holy Island, Cragside, Kielder, Teesdale

evidence.excerpt: Thursday August 7  070809 Friday 11.15, Simon, Eve & Tonic set off to Northumberland.
We left for Bham at 4pm + had supper at Pinnocchio's When we got home.

boundaries.title_guess: Exmoor weekend: Halse Farm, Winsford Hill, Brandon Hills, Queens Camel

evidence.excerpt: October 16th Friday. 1.50. Simon, Eve & Tonic left for a w/end holiday ... Halse Farm campsite (middle of Exmoor)

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with a 'September/October' note recording 3 separate local teas/lunches in the van, then starts the Oct 16th Exmoor weekend trip below it.

boundaries.title_guess: Brecon Beacons & Welsh borders: Penrhos, Torpantau, Crickhowell, Abbey Dore

evidence.excerpt: At 12.50. we arrived at the Thatch, Queens Camel, for lunch with the Urbaincyks.
Friday April 9th 2010 @ 6.15. Simon + Eve set off with Tonic ... drove thru [?Sunshine] to the Walks Penrhos, Wales, on the way to the Brecons

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page top finishes the Exmoor weekend (Queens Camel lunch return leg), then a one-line Oct 24th tea outing note, then starts the Brecons trip 'Friday April 9th 2010'.

boundaries.title_guess: Cotswolds: Moreton-in-Marsh, Pangolin Foundry (Chalford), Lower Swell, Folly Farm, Snowshill Manor

evidence.excerpt: Friday May 7th. 6.25t we left Westfield [?S] & drove to Moreton on the Marsh
They drove back to London & we are going back to Birmingham.

boundaries.title_guess: Local tea outing: Strawberry Tea with Margaret & Helen

evidence.excerpt: We had lunch in the carpark. They drove back to London & we are going back to Birmingham.
23 May Sunday Traffic jams as we left [?Sham] at 1.30 to take Margaret & Helen out for a Strawberry Tea.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page finishes the Cotswolds trip ('going back to Birmingham') then starts the short May 23rd Strawberry Tea outing on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: Shropshire & Wales: Ludlow, Elstich Barns, Stokesay Castle, Elan Valley

evidence.excerpt: Friday June 11th. At 2.15. we left for Wales. Simon, Eve, Peter, Magda Lipinska. And Tonic.
Saturday June 12th ... We went to Stokesay Castle ... Enroute to the Elan Valley Reservoirs

open_at_end: Trip starting B_0173_R (Ludlow / Stokesay / Elan Valley, June 2010) is still in progress at B_0174_R, the last transcribed spread; narrative on the Elan Valley reservoirs is cut off mid-sentence and continues past this window.
notes: Window opens with two index pages (B_0145_L, B_0145_R, B_0146_L) from volB book3 listing the 2008-2009 trips; first diary text is B_0146_R. The big 2008 Spain/France trip runs B_0146_R->B_0158_R. From spring 2009 the diary shifts to many short UK weekend trips plus brief same-day van outings to take elderly relatives (Margaret/Helen) out for tea; several of those micro-outings share physical pages with the start/end of longer trips (flagged mixed). The day-outing 'trips' (B_0159_L, B_0162_L, B_0162_R, B_0172_R) are genuine but very short and given lower confidence; the merge step may choose to fold or treat them as their own outings. Place names like 86 and Sham=Birmingham/home confirm home departures and returns.
